description: Style Note This summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DetailsLine green top with a split neckline, is sleeveless with ruffles on the arm hole, ruffle detailing along the neckline and the nape, lace detailing on the front and elasticated smocking at hemMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry low Use warm ironSize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
